title: The Realities of Work for Individuals with Disabilities: Impact of Age, Education, and Work Experience (CBPP, 2015)
description: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities commentary (Paul N. Van de Water, Nov 20, 2015; remarks at the National Disability Forum) arguing for caution in revising how SSA weighs vocational factors — age, limited education, and lack of transferable skills — in disability determination. Explains why disability is not a purely medical concept and how vocational factors interact with the statutory definition of disability and substantial gainful activity. Directly relevant to the vocational-grid / Step-5 logic DDS examiners apply.

source.publisher: Center on Budget and Policy Priorities (CBPP)
source.title: The Realities of Work for Individuals with Disabilities: Impact of Age, Education, and Work Experience
